evals.prompt: Lead a multi-terminal Codex team from issue selection to reviewer-agent acceptance and merge.
evals.expected_output: Maintains STATUS.md, selects ready issues, assigns spec/build/check/review roles, manages local Git worktrees, keeps every parallel-safe issue stream active, tracks local resource conflicts, watches cycles, merges after reviewer-agent acceptance and green checks, compacts completed status, and escalates blockers.
assertions: Requires a completion contract before implementation starts.
Keeps builder, checker, and reviewer ownership separate.
Tracks worktree, branch, PR, phase, cycle count, and next action.
Starts all independent ready streams concurrently when local resources allow.
Treats reviewer-agent acceptance plus green required checks as the merge gate.
Requires PR bodies to carry linked issues, related PRs, stack/downstream references, validation, risks, and merge notes before reviewer acceptance or merge.
Records fixed ports, Docker Compose projects, databases, caches, or local services as throughput blockers when they cannot be isolated.
Runs closure checks before reporting the overall run complete.
Stops or escalates when repeated failures or unresolved maintainer questions appear.
